name: Eclair Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the pudding and milk according to the box directions.
2. Stir in the Cool Whip.
3. Place 15 crackers squares on the bottom of a 13x9" pan.
4. Spread half of the pudding mixture over the crackers.
5. Arrange another 15 crackers on top.
6. Add the remaining pudding.
7. Cover with another layer of 15 crackers.
8. Mix together the cocoa, butter, and Sweetened Condensed Milk in a saucepan.
9. Heat until well combined.
10. Pour the hot mixture over the crackers.
Note: Do not heat the mixture too long to avoid burning.
